headline: Will Debt Issuance Optimism and Enertel AI Deal Change S&P Global's (SPGI) Narrative
summary: In recent weeks, S&P Global has drawn renewed attention as analysts highlighted resilient debt issuance trends, rising M&A financing needs and expectations for a double‑digit earnings increase ahead of its late‑April 2026 results. Investor interest has also been reinforced by S&P Global’s acquisition of Enertel AI, which adds advanced power price forecasting capabilities to its energy analytics portfolio. Next, we’ll examine how this optimism around debt issuance and earnings expectations...
